institution.name: Central Methodist University-College of Liberal Arts and Sciences

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Central Methodist University-College of Liberal Arts and Sciences rose 15% between 2006 and 2009 ($16.2k → $18.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Central Methodist University-College of Liberal Arts and Sciences fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Central Methodist University-College of Liberal Arts and Sciences rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 (37.8% → 43.9%).
